title: Analyze IR drop across the power grid
description: Check that the supply voltage reaching each block stays within droop limits under peak switching current.
body: Use when verifying the power delivery network of a placed design. Do not assume the nominal supply reaches every cell, since grid resistance causes droop under load. Actions: run static and dynamic IR-drop analysis, identify high-droop regions, and reinforce the grid with more straps or vias. Validation signals include supply droop within the allowed limit across the grid and no timing-critical block starved of voltage. Risk boundary: excessive IR drop slows logic and can cause functional failure, so escalate grid reinforcement when droop exceeds the budget.
